title: hunspell-ka bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.1-3.1]
- Add gating.yaml file

[0.1-3]
- Fix Source and URL tags
- Use correct upstream source tarball
- Add Supplements for langpacks-ka
- Enable this package to be used for EL < 9 version

[0.1-2]
- Changed versioning
- spec file cleanup

[0.1-1]
- initial version
